ItacPersonItem.Notes: She was prince of the Pacifici, see Discorso secondo, in her Operae (1688). See Maschietto, Elena Lucrezia Cornaro Piscopia. Prima donna laureata nel mondo (Padua, 1978); and the biography by R Derosas in DBI. Most recent study is Guernsey, The Lady Cornaro. Pride and Prodigy in Venice (2001), but does not mention Intronati. Her personal `impresa` as Accademica Infeconda is described in Pompe funebri (1686), p. 5.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
